title: helichrysum cerastoides var. cerastoides
intro: Helichrysum cerastoides var. cerastoides, also known as Creeping Resurrection or Creeping Ground Helichrysum, is a perennial succulent plant native to South Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, wound healing, and antimicrobial properties that can help combat infections and promote overall well-being. Helichrysum cerastoides var. cerastoides can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
